codeReview.summary: The feature stays within scope and improves proof quality only: it reworks the existing hydrate-roundtrip regressions in core/tests/integration_db.rs so list/list_limit assertions no longer depend on incidental ordering. The multi-row fixtures now seed a distinct second root, narrow list_limit to the exercised multi-row state, and still verify the intended row explicitly by id while preserving the underlying runtime contract and raw RecordId storage assertions.
